summary: This proposal aims to establish a standardized method for creating new intellectual properties (IPs) by remixing multiple existing IPs in a decentralized manner. The protocol is built on the foundation of NFTs (Non-Fungible Tokens). Within this protocol, each intellectual property is represented as an NFT. It extends the [ERC-721](./eip-721.md) standard, enabling users to generate a new NFT by remixing multiple existing NFTs. To ensure transparency and traceability in the creation process, the relationships between the new NFT and the original NFTs are recorded on the blockchain and made publicly accessible. Furthermore, to enhance the liquidity of IP, users not only have the ability to remix NFTs they own but can also grant permission to others to participate in the creation of new NFTs u
title: Open IP Protocol built on NFTs
